Describe the visual sequence from the opening title to the end of the first riding segment.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a title card for FELT bicycles appears; at 4s, a forest scene with white tree trunks is shown; at 6s, a person rides a bike through the woods; at 8s, a rider in a white helmet passes bushes; at 10s, the riding scene fades to an empty screen.

question: Describe the specific riding actions and gear visible in the final segments of the video.
canonical_answer: At 14s, a cyclist in a dark shirt rides towards the camera on a dirt path; at 16s, a rider wearing sunglasses and a black jersey moves past foliage; at 18s, a close-up shows neon green handlebars against a dirt wall.
